exam_format: Computer-based. Combination of selected-response and, for some, constructed-response items. Domain-level feedback provided.

testing_centers.provider: Pearson VUE test centers or online proctoring (where available)
testing_centers.notes: Computer-based. Some tests include constructed-response sections. Score reports include detailed performance by domain. Score validity and passing thresholds set by individual states/territories.

id_requirements: Government-issued photo ID. Name must match registration exactly.
exam_rules: Closed book. No personal calculators or notes unless specified. Follow Pearson testing policies.
renewal_options: Scores typically valid for 5-10 years depending on the state. No renewal of the exam itself; recertification follows state rules for teaching licenses.

retake_policy.notes: Retake policies may be further restricted by the state using the score. Full fee per attempt.
